programme.title: Film Stars Don't Die in Liverpool
Doom Patrol
programme.desc: The Chief has disappeared and the only clue that the team have to his whereabouts is an average donkey.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: The group heads for Paraguay by bus to follow up a lead on the donkey. Flit teleports Larry and Cliff there and they meet the man responsible for Morden's transformation into Mr Nobody.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: The group heads for Paraguay by bus to follow up a lead on the donkey. Flit teleports Larry and Cliff there and they meet the man responsible for Morden's transformation into Mr Nobody.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: When he learns that the Unwritten Book is about to be read, ending the world, Willoughby Kipling comes looking for Niles but only finds the Doom Patrol.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: When he learns that the Unwritten Book is about to be read, ending the world, Willoughby Kipling comes looking for Niles but only finds the Doom Patrol.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Mr Nobody decides to interfere with the Decreator's prophecy with the help of Niles Caulder.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Cliff and Victor come to an agreement; Jane, Rita, and Larry go in search of a mysterious team called the Doom Patrol.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Cliff and Victor come to an agreement; Jane, Rita, and Larry go in search of a mysterious team called the Doom Patrol.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: After a violent outburst from Cliff, the team engages in some self-led group therapy, leading to some growth within the group as they are knit closer together.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: After a violent outburst from Cliff, the team engages in some self-led group therapy, leading to some growth within the group as they are knit closer together.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Jane retreats into a treacherous place in her own mind called The Underground, where she encounters her many personas and dark traumas from her past.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Jane retreats into a treacherous place in her own mind called The Underground, where she encounters her many personas and dark traumas from her past.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Vic and Rita face a dangerous man known as the Beard Hunter, who has been activated by the Bureau of Normalcy to find Niles Caulder.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Larry pays a visit to his long-lost love; Cliff and Rita travel to Gator Country to reconnect with his daughter.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Larry pays a visit to his long-lost love; Cliff and Rita travel to Gator Country to reconnect with his daughter.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Silas asks for the team's help rescuing Victor from the Ant Farm. While imprisoned, Victor learns more about the AI rebooting in his head, and meets his neighbouring prisoner.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Rita tries to sooth Victor during a difficult time; the team find Flex Mentallo and try to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: The team finally try to track down Niles, and with some help from Flex enter White Space to confront Mr Nobody. There's only one thing that will defeat Mr Nobody, and only Niles knows it.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: The team tries to cope with a hard truth as Mr Nobody prepares for his final act of vengeance.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: The team tries to cope with a hard truth as Mr Nobody prepares for his final act of vengeance.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Jane retreats into a treacherous place in her own mind called The Underground, where she encounters her many personas and dark traumas from her past.

programme.desc: Vic and Rita face a dangerous man known as the Beard Hunter, who has been activated by the Bureau of Normalcy to find Niles Caulder.

programme.title: Ben
programme.desc: Ben works for Grand Quest, a major regional daily. She gets a tip about the body of a student before the police. The case brings up painful parts of her childhood.

programme.title: Ben
programme.desc: Ben works for Grand Quest, a major regional daily. She gets a tip about the body of a student before the police. The case brings up painful parts of her childhood.

programme.title: Ben
programme.desc: Ben witnesses the abduction of a young woman who is pregnant. In her efforts to find her, she comes up against a criminal network offering surrogacy to childless couples.

programme.title: Ben
programme.desc: Ben witnesses the abduction of a young woman who is pregnant. In her efforts to find her, she comes up against a criminal network offering surrogacy to childless couples.

programme.title: AFLW Grand Final Glory: 2024 GF NM v BRI
AFL Draft: Day 2
programme.desc: Join the Fox Footy team for rounds 2-7 of the 2025 AFL Draft.

programme.title: AFL: Western Bulldogs v St Kilda
AFLW: PF NMT v MEL
programme.desc: Defending AFLW premier North Melbourne hosts rivals Melbourne at Ikon Park for a place in the 2025 Grand Final.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 1999 R16 WC v FRE
programme.desc: The 90s the decade that delivered. There would be three new teams, for the first time non-Victorian clubs would take premiership honours and it was a decade of goalkicking maestros Jason Dunstall, Gary Ablett and Tony Lockett.

programme.title: AFLW Grand Final Glory: '17 GF BRI v ADE
AFLW Grand Final Glory: 2018 GF WB v BRI
programme.desc: Grand finals are where the glory lies. In the lead up to this year's AFLW Grand Final, take a look back at previous years deciders.

programme.title: AFLW Grand Final Glory: 19 GF ADE v CAR
programme.desc: Grand finals are where the glory lies. In the lead up to this year's AFLW Grand Final, take a look back at previous years deciders.

programme.title: AFLW Grand Final Glory: 21 GF ADE v BRI
Best Games Ever: 2005 SF SYD v GEE
programme.desc: The 2000s - a decade where Brisbane and Geelong ruled the roost and an era of Brown, Judd and Ablett.

programme.title: The W Awards
programme.desc: It's time to celebrate the best of the best in the AFLW, as we award the Rising Star, All Australian Team, and Best & Fairest Player of 2025.

programme.title: AFLW Grand Final Glory: 22 GF ADE v BRI
programme.desc: Grand finals are where the glory lies. In the lead up to this year's AFLW Grand Final, take a look back at previous years deciders.

programme.desc: Grand finals are where the glory lies. In the lead up to this year's AFLW Grand Final, take a look back at previous years deciders.

programme.title: AFLW Grand Final Glory: 2024 GF NM v BRI
programme.desc: Grand finals are where the glory lies. In the lead up to this year's AFLW Grand Final, take a look back at previous years deciders.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 2004 R11 ESS v HAW
programme.desc: 2004, Round 11. Essendon and the Hawks have hated each other for generations. But the now infamous 'Line in the Sand' game would stoke the fire for years to come. This is unrelenting, unapologetic, unsociable footy.

programme.title: AFLW Grand Final Glory: 22 GF ADE v BRI
programme.desc: Grand finals are where the glory lies. In the lead up to this year's AFLW Grand Final, take a look back at previous years deciders.

programme.title: AFLW: QF NMT v HAW
programme.desc: A blockbuster Qualifying Final between defending premier North Melbourne and rivals Hawthorn to kick off the 2025 AFLW Finals Series.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Teams of reality TV veterans compete with stunts involving a demolition derby and an alligator-infested swamp.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Teams of reality TV veterans compete with stunts involving a demolition derby and an alligator-infested swamp.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Ivo Graham finally claims to have done a task, and Frankie Boyle goes to town on a giant cat scratch post.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We kick things off by celebrating the most dangerous vehicle on the road, The Lada, before locking up some law-breaking motorists firmly Behind Bars.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We kick things off with some of the biggest beasts that share our roads, so we'll be showcasing them in Trucking Around but another oversized vehicle will feel our wrath in The Not So Fabulous 4x4.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: As Labrador's winter draws near, the participants lean into building their permanent shelters. As hunger persists, some participants face dire odds, while others are met with rich opportunities.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: As Labrador's winter draws near, the participants lean into building their permanent shelters. As hunger persists, some participants face dire odds, while others are met with rich opportunities.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: While a trip abroad makes old world connections to the new world, on Oak Island, the team is thrilled when new evidence indicates that whoever was on Lot 5, was also deep in the Money Pit.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: While a trip abroad makes old world connections to the new world, on Oak Island, the team is thrilled when new evidence indicates that whoever was on Lot 5, was also deep in the Money Pit.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Teams of reality TV veterans compete with stunts involving a demolition derby and an alligator-infested swamp.

programme.title: Velma
programme.desc: The origin of the sleuth and member of the Mystery Inc. gang, Velma.

programme.title: Velma
programme.desc: The origin of the sleuth and member of the Mystery Inc. gang, Velma.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another episode of the hilarious game show where everything is made up and the points don't matter. Rob Gronkowski and Jonathan Mangum feature as special guests.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another episode of the hilarious game show where everything is made up and the points don't matter. Rob Gronkowski and Jonathan Mangum feature as special guests.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another episode of the hilarious game show where everything is made up and the points don't matter. Robbie Amell and Jeff Davis feature as special guests.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek and friends critique viral videos, categorizing them into "Hot Mess" "Worst Case Scenario" "Redneck Good Times" and "What Happened Last Night".

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek and friends critique viral videos, categorizing them into "Hot Mess" "Worst Case Scenario" "Redneck Good Times" and "What Happened Last Night".

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: It's nearly the end of the series and the pressure is so intense that Mae Martin immediately forgets the only rule to a task.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: A hijacked red Hyundai leads the guys on a hunt; after a successful celebrity escort and attending to a major road rage dispute, Rob ends the shift with some sound marriage advice to a young lead foot.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: A hijacked red Hyundai leads the guys on a hunt; after a successful celebrity escort and attending to a major road rage dispute, Rob ends the shift with some sound marriage advice to a young lead foot.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: A red, heavy vehicle runs a red light and pays the price. Then, a truck rollover is calling, but the guys are slowed by uncooperative drivers, and an unsecured load gets their attention.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: A red, heavy vehicle runs a red light and pays the price. Then, a truck rollover is calling, but the guys are slowed by uncooperative drivers, and an unsecured load gets their attention.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Outback trucking legend Steve Grahame and his faithful canine companion Bella take a monster load cross country from the red centre to the west coast.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Darrell and Lisa struggle to make it home over the hardest hit trail on the winter roads system. Art and the King of Obsolete reunite to haul a giant double trailer over a slick path.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Darrell and Lisa struggle to make it home over the hardest hit trail on the winter roads system. Art and the King of Obsolete reunite to haul a giant double trailer over a slick path.

programme.title: Swamp Mysteries With Troy Landry
programme.desc: The King of the Swamp investigates disturbing phenomena in a malevolent section of swamp home to strange creatures.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers are losing their minds in West Covina. Kenny hunts for cougars, but finds a portable pulpit instead. Ivy shows the ladies how to dress for success.

programme.desc: Outback trucking legend Steve Grahame and his faithful canine companion Bella take a monster load cross country from the red centre to the west coast.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: When Colette learns Noa is seeing someone, Ceci urges her to use a little magic to win him back. Meanwhile, Barb hunts for the culprit behind rude DMV graffiti.

programme.desc: Darrell and Lisa struggle to make it home over the hardest hit trail on the winter roads system. Art and the King of Obsolete reunite to haul a giant double trailer over a slick path.

programme.title: Swamp Mysteries With Troy Landry
programme.desc: Troy Landry chases a legendary treasure hidden deep in the bayou, helped by his right-hand man Pickle Wheat and veteran hunter Don Brewer; using just a map and an old man's tale.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers are losing their minds in West Covina. Kenny hunts for cougars, but finds a portable pulpit instead. Ivy shows the ladies how to dress for success.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: It's back to Moreno Valley, where Justin's congeniality earns him Rene's goodwill and a chance to level up, and Darrell's tubular locker tests out OK.

programme.title: Live: Abu Dhabi T10: Day 7
programme.desc: The 10-over format gets underway in UAE with Marcus Stonis, Tim David and more competing for this year's T10 title.

programme.title: Ashes: 1994/95 2nd Test
programme.desc: The 94-95 Ashes series showcased a dominant Australian team, Mark Taylor and David Boon delivered exceptional batting, while McDermott and Warne led the bowling attack.

programme.title: The Ashes First Test
programme.desc: The greatest rivalry in cricket gets underway as Australian Captain Steve Smith takes on England's Ben Stokes in Perth.

programme.title: WBBL Mini: STR v HEA
programme.desc: Strikers' Darcie Brown and Megan Schutt hope to contain a hungry Heat looking for points.

programme.title: WBBL The Blast
programme.desc: The Blast brings you all the analysis and laughs from Karen Rolton following Strikers v Heat.

programme.title: Test Mini IND v SA: 2nd Test Day 4
programme.desc: Day Four. South Africa choose not to inflict the follow on, but the tourist are still nearing a famous series win.

programme.desc: The greatest rivalry in cricket gets underway as Australian Captain Steve Smith takes on England's Ben Stokes in Perth.

programme.desc: After suffering their first loss of the season, the Hurricanes face another test against the in-form Stars.

programme.title: The Overlap: Stick to Cricket
programme.desc: Michael Vaughan, Phil Tufnell and Alastair Cook review the latest Ashes test match from the English point of view.

programme.title: Test Day: The Ashes T1 D1
programme.desc: Day one of an Ashes series, it doesn't get any better. Steve Smith vs Joe Root, two Aussie debutants and a bit of Bazball to get things going.

WBBL Mini: STR v HEA
programme.desc: Strikers' Darcie Brown and Megan Schutt hope to contain a hungry Heat looking for points.

programme.title: 2003: PGA Championship
programme.desc: Veteran Peter Senior bogeyed the final two holes but held on to win the Australian PGA tournament for a second time by one shot at Coolum on Queensland's Sunshine Coast.

programme.title: 2003: PGA Championship
programme.desc: Veteran Peter Senior bogeyed the final two holes but held on to win the Australian PGA tournament for a second time by one shot at Coolum on Queensland's Sunshine Coast.

programme.title: 2004: Australia PGA Championship
programme.desc: Peter Lonard shot a 7-under-par final round of 65 to take out the Australian PGA Championship at Coolum on Queensland's Sunshine Coast.

programme.title: 2005: Australia PGA Championship
programme.desc: Robert Allenby won the 2005 Australian Pga Championship by one shot on Queensland's Sunshine Coast, beating Tasmanian Mathew Goggin.

programme.title: 2005: Australia PGA Championship
programme.desc: Robert Allenby won the 2005 Australian Pga Championship by one shot on Queensland's Sunshine Coast, beating Tasmanian Mathew Goggin.

programme.title: 2023: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Min Woo Lee celebrated his first Australian PGA Championship title in 2023. A chin-in eagle on the ninth hole set up his runaway victory and brought the crowd alive.

programme.title: 2014: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Held at Royal Pines Resort, Greg Chalmers triumphed in a thrilling finish. Tied with defending champion and fellow Aussie Adam Scott, they faced a sudden-death playoff. Chalmers secured victory with a birdie on the first extra hole.

programme.title: 2017: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Cameron Smith won the 2017 Australian PGA Championship at Royal Pines Resort, finishing at 19-under-par. This marked his first title at the event, showcasing his talent on home soil.

programme.title: 2017: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Cameron Smith won the 2017 Australian PGA Championship at Royal Pines Resort, finishing at 19-under-par. This marked his first title at the event, showcasing his talent on home soil.

programme.title: 2018: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: In 2018, The Australian PGA Champion was Cameron Smith, who successfully defended his 2017 title with a two-shot win.

programme.title: 2019: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Adam Scott claimed victory in 2019 over New Zealand's Michael Hendry at Royal Pines Resort. This becomes Scott's first tournament victory in three years and his second Australian PGA Championship title.

programme.title: 2019: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Adam Scott claimed victory in 2019 over New Zealand's Michael Hendry at Royal Pines Resort. This becomes Scott's first tournament victory in three years and his second Australian PGA Championship title.

programme.title: 2021: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Australian Jed Morgan created history when he won in 2021. Not only did he break the championship's biggest winning margin - previously eight shots held by Greg Norman, he also was the youngest winner of the tournamwent in 60 years.

programme.title: 2021: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Australian Jed Morgan created history when he won in 2021. Not only did he break the championship's biggest winning margin - previously eight shots held by Greg Norman, he also was the youngest winner of the tournamwent in 60 years.

programme.title: 2023: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Min Woo Lee celebrated his first Australian PGA Championship title in 2023. A chin-in eagle on the ninth hole set up his runaway victory and brought the crowd alive.

programme.title: Golf: Australian PGA: Final Round
programme.desc: Final round coverage of the Australian PGA Championship from the Royal Queensland Golf Club, Brisbane.

programme.title: 2014: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Held at Royal Pines Resort, Greg Chalmers triumphed in a thrilling finish. Tied with defending champion and fellow Aussie Adam Scott, they faced a sudden-death playoff. Chalmers secured victory with a birdie on the first extra hole.

programme.title: 2014: Australian PGA Championship Men's
programme.desc: Held at Royal Pines Resort, Greg Chalmers triumphed in a thrilling finish. Tied with defending champion and fellow Aussie Adam Scott, they faced a sudden-death playoff. Chalmers secured victory with a birdie on the first extra hole.

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: This bizarre, Hitchcockian comedy sees a kooky divorcee and a bumbling Federal agent take on a posse of Hollywood weirdos planning to assassinate the Pope.

programme.title: Barbarella
programme.desc: In the far future, in a time of way-out, psychedelic spaceships and free love, space agent Barbarella is assigned to stop the evil Durand-Durand and save humanity.

programme.title: Barbarella
programme.desc: In the far future, in a time of way-out, psychedelic spaceships and free love, space agent Barbarella is assigned to stop the evil Durand-Durand and save humanity.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Thrill-seeking meteorologists are chasing the most destructive tornado in 50 years.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Thrill-seeking meteorologists are chasing the most destructive tornado in 50 years.

programme.title: Top Secret!
programme.desc: In this rock 'n' roll spy spoof, an Elvis-like pop idol who becomes embroiled in intrigue on a tour of East Germany and falls in love with a French Resistance Fighter.

programme.title: Top Secret!
programme.desc: In this rock 'n' roll spy spoof, an Elvis-like pop idol who becomes embroiled in intrigue on a tour of East Germany and falls in love with a French Resistance Fighter.

programme.title: Coming to America
programme.desc: Join an African prince on an unforgettable comic quest to the New World, as it's time for him to find a princess.

programme.title: Coming to America
programme.desc: Join an African prince on an unforgettable comic quest to the New World, as it's time for him to find a princess.

programme.title: Junior
programme.desc: You'll never guess who's going to have a baby. Watch as the maternal tables are turned forever when, after taking an experimental drug, a male scientist becomes pregnant.

programme.title: Junior
programme.desc: You'll never guess who's going to have a baby. Watch as the maternal tables are turned forever when, after taking an experimental drug, a male scientist becomes pregnant.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: A Special Operations veteran is now into peace, serenity and non-violence. But when Trautman is held by the Soviets and interrogated, the CIA can do nothing and Rambo must come to his aid.

programme.title: Grumpy Old Men
programme.desc: When a lonely, flamboyant, middle-aged widow moves in across the street from them, the male rivalry between two neighbours begins.

programme.title: Grumpy Old Men
programme.desc: When a lonely, flamboyant, middle-aged widow moves in across the street from them, the male rivalry between two neighbours begins.

programme.title: Blues Brothers 2000
programme.desc: Sequel to the 1980 cult classic, Jake and Elwood must reunite the old band, with a few new members, and go on another "Mission from God".

programme.title: Blues Brothers 2000
programme.desc: Sequel to the 1980 cult classic, Jake and Elwood must reunite the old band, with a few new members, and go on another "Mission from God".

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: Follows an undercover cop whose attempt to locate a boy and his mother leads him to a kindergarten where he poses as an unlikely teacher. A classic comedy with a sharp crime edge to it.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: On the wedding day at Chateau de la Boutiniere, Alison and Zion have plenty left to do; Jon and Carmen are creating a downstairs bathroom from scratch.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: On the wedding day at Chateau de la Boutiniere, Alison and Zion have plenty left to do; Jon and Carmen are creating a downstairs bathroom from scratch.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Wollaton Hall is the perfect backdrop for Fiona Bruce as she tries to guess the value of Batman's mask, his utility belt and the Joker's suit, as worn by Jack Nicholson.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Wollaton Hall is the perfect backdrop for Fiona Bruce as she tries to guess the value of Batman's mask, his utility belt and the Joker's suit, as worn by Jack Nicholson.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Charlie Ross hosts from Nottingham Racecourse with Thomas Plant and Nick Hall advising. Charlie also explores gruesome tales at one of Britain's oldest pubs.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Charlie Ross hosts from Nottingham Racecourse with Thomas Plant and Nick Hall advising. Charlie also explores gruesome tales at one of Britain's oldest pubs.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A 62-year-old woman arrives by air ambulance after being trapped in her car for over an hour. Meanwhile, a 23-year-old man has badly cut his knee after a night out with friends.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A 62-year-old woman arrives by air ambulance after being trapped in her car for over an hour. Meanwhile, a 23-year-old man has badly cut his knee after a night out with friends.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow is at Bodnant Garden in North Wales, where treasures include a pair of rare Wedgewood tigers, a carved Russian chair, and a silver box with a political connection.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow is at Bodnant Garden in North Wales, where treasures include a pair of rare Wedgewood tigers, a carved Russian chair, and a silver box with a political connection.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Charlie Ross hosts from Nottingham Racecourse with Thomas Plant and Nick Hall advising. Charlie also explores gruesome tales at one of Britain's oldest pubs.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams go head-to-head in a bid to sell their recently acquired items for a profit at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Inside The Four Seasons
programme.desc: Michelin-starred chef Yannick Alleno visits Pavyllon as staff strive for perfection, sealing deals and unveiling the secrets of the hotel's exclusive wine cellar.

programme.title: Inside The Four Seasons
programme.desc: Michelin-starred chef Yannick Alleno visits Pavyllon as staff strive for perfection, sealing deals and unveiling the secrets of the hotel's exclusive wine cellar.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a young couple buy their first home in Leicestershire and meets a former beautician who became a full-time farmer.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a young couple buy their first home in Leicestershire and meets a former beautician who became a full-time farmer.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: In Children's Week, the sewers tackle a sequined bomber jacket, create animal-themed fancy dress from beach towels, and design outfits inspired by childhood photos for mini models.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: In Children's Week, the sewers tackle a sequined bomber jacket, create animal-themed fancy dress from beach towels, and design outfits inspired by childhood photos for mini models.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Margie and David are a couple of old, yoga-loving hippies. They've enjoyed their four-bedroom Central Coast home for 16 years and raised three children here, but it's time to downsize.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Margie and David are a couple of old, yoga-loving hippies. They've enjoyed their four-bedroom Central Coast home for 16 years and raised three children here, but it's time to downsize.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Sonali Shah helps an outdoor enthusiast and her three chihuahuas find a Welsh home and meets artists running a rural business.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Sonali Shah helps an outdoor enthusiast and her three chihuahuas find a Welsh home and meets artists running a rural business.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A special show celebrates childhood toys from the last 100 years, featuring Sindy dolls, Star Wars figures and much loved games.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Wollaton Hall is the perfect backdrop for Fiona Bruce as she tries to guess the value of Batman's mask, his utility belt and the Joker's suit, as worn by Jack Nicholson.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Anita Manning hosts from The Royal Cornwall Showground, and lending a hand to the teams are Phil Serrell and Tim Weeks.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Anita Manning hosts from The Royal Cornwall Showground, and lending a hand to the teams are Phil Serrell and Tim Weeks.

programme.title: Better Homes & Gardens
programme.desc: When Dr Harry first met zoologist Chris Humfrey, he knew he'd found a kindred spirit. At Wild Action Zoo in Macedon, Victoria, you'll find everything from koalas to cassowaries and lots of creatures in between.

programme.title: Better Homes & Gardens
programme.desc: When Dr Harry first met zoologist Chris Humfrey, he knew he'd found a kindred spirit. At Wild Action Zoo in Macedon, Victoria, you'll find everything from koalas to cassowaries and lots of creatures in between.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Ben and Billie convert a hallway into a lounge; Jane and Rory remove a tree too close to cables.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: On the wedding day at Chateau de la Boutiniere, Alison and Zion have plenty left to do; Jon and Carmen are creating a downstairs bathroom from scratch.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: We revisit house hunters whose searches were all about flying the nest. Chloe was torn between her wants and her dad's, who was helping with funds. Meanwhile, Ella wanted Grant to move out of his mum's.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Margie and David are a couple of old, yoga-loving hippies. They've enjoyed their four-bedroom Central Coast home for 16 years and raised three children here, but it's time to downsize.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Margie and David are a couple of old, yoga-loving hippies. They've enjoyed their four-bedroom Central Coast home for 16 years and raised three children here, but it's time to downsize.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Fiona & Alex, paramedics who met in training, clash over staying or moving. She wants comfort, he wants change. Neale updates their home while Andrew looks for their next one.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Fiona & Alex, paramedics who met in training, clash over staying or moving. She wants comfort, he wants change. Neale updates their home while Andrew looks for their next one.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: New Zealand's Best Homes
programme.desc: Phil Spencer explores some of New Zealand's most stunning and desirable homes - from luxury mountain retreats to urban architectural wonders.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: New Zealand's Best Homes
programme.desc: Phil Spencer explores some of New Zealand's most stunning and desirable homes - from luxury mountain retreats to urban architectural wonders.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a young couple buy their first home in Leicestershire and meets a former beautician who became a full-time farmer.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Sonali Shah helps an outdoor enthusiast and her three chihuahuas find a Welsh home and meets artists running a rural business.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Fiona & Alex, paramedics who met in training, clash over staying or moving. She wants comfort, he wants change. Neale updates their home while Andrew looks for their next one.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Fiona and Alex met while training to be Paramedics. Fast forward 11 years and they're facing their first disagreement to stay or leave their home. Fiona wants to stay in her comfort zone while Alex thinks it's time to move on to something bigger and better. Can Neale breathe new life into their house or will Andrew rescue their future dreams and find their next forever home.

programme.title: Twisted Nanny
programme.desc: When single mother Julia realizes night nanny Olivia is turning her children against her, Julia must fight to prove that Olivia is not who she says she is before she gets custody of the kids for good.

programme.title: Twisted Nanny
programme.desc: When single mother Julia realizes night nanny Olivia is turning her children against her, Julia must fight to prove that Olivia is not who she says she is before she gets custody of the kids for good.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, Bourne has left his violent past behind and is living a normal life with Marie. His plans for a peaceful life are crushed when he narrowly escapes an assassination attempt.

programme.title: Snatch
programme.desc: Crooked boxing promoters, violent bookies, a Russian gangster, incompetent robbers, and suss jewellers fight over a priceless stolen diamond.

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: On a deadly mission behind enemy lines a wily WWII sergeant, his loyal Sherman tank crew and a rookie soldier find themselves hopelessly outnumbered.

programme.title: Hailey Dean: A Prescription For Murder
programme.desc: A psychologist and former prosecutor aids a detective in investigating a rapidly growing string of murders at Atlanta Memorial Hospital.

programme.title: Hailey Dean: A Prescription For Murder
programme.desc: A psychologist and former prosecutor aids a detective in investigating a rapidly growing string of murders at Atlanta Memorial Hospital.

programme.title: Split
programme.desc: Three girls are kidnapped by a man with 23 distinct personalities and they must try to escape before the next one emerges.

programme.title: Inferno
programme.desc: When Robert Langdon wakes up in an Italian hospital with amnesia, he teams up with Dr Sienna Brooks, and together they must race across Europe against the clock to foil a deadly global plot.

programme.title: Oslo
programme.desc: Adapted from the Tony Award-winning play of the same name, this film is based on a true story of negotiations between implacable enemies that led to the 1993 Oslo Peace Accords.

programme.title: A Hollywood Christmas
programme.desc: Jessica, a film-maker who directs Christmas movies, has her life thrown into a real-life Hollywood Christmas drama when a network executive shows up and threatens to halt production on her latest film.

programme.title: Christmas Eve in Miller's Point
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a family gathers for what may be their last holiday in their ancestral home. As tensions rise, a teen sneaks out with friends to take over the wintry suburb for herself.

programme.title: Happiest Season
programme.desc: A holiday romantic comedy that captures the range of emotions tied to wanting your family's acceptance, being true to yourself, and trying not to ruin Christmas.

programme.title: Happiest Season
programme.desc: A holiday romantic comedy that captures the range of emotions tied to wanting your family's acceptance, being true to yourself, and trying not to ruin Christmas.

programme.title: The Christmas Aunt
programme.desc: Two weeks before Christmas, Rebecca Miller returns home to Tennessee to take care of her niece and nephew and ends up reconnecting with her childhood best friend.

programme.title: The Christmas Aunt
programme.desc: Two weeks before Christmas, Rebecca Miller returns home to Tennessee to take care of her niece and nephew and ends up reconnecting with her childhood best friend.

programme.title: The Christmas Edition
programme.desc: Up-and-coming journalist Jackie seizes the opportunity to run a small-town newspaper in Alaska and uses a series of Christmas articles to help the struggling business.

programme.title: The Christmas Edition
programme.desc: Up-and-coming journalist Jackie seizes the opportunity to run a small-town newspaper in Alaska and uses a series of Christmas articles to help the struggling business.

programme.title: Serendipity
programme.desc: In the course of one magical evening, Jonathan and Sara meet unexpectedly and fall in love. Years later, they are both engaged to others, but cannot give up the dream that one day meet again.

programme.title: Dear Christmas
programme.desc: A podcast host develops an unexpected romance with a local firefighter during the holidays.

programme.title: Dear Christmas
programme.desc: A podcast host develops an unexpected romance with a local firefighter during the holidays.

programme.title: You Light Up My Christmas
programme.desc: Emma returns to her hometown for Christmas. She discovers the lights have gone dim in the once festive town, prompting her to reconnect with an old flame to set their hearts and the town ablaze with light again.

programme.title: You Light Up My Christmas
programme.desc: Emma returns to her hometown for Christmas. She discovers the lights have gone dim in the once festive town, prompting her to reconnect with an old flame to set their hearts and the town ablaze with light again.

programme.title: Just in Time for Christmas
programme.desc: Grandpa Jim is scheduled to make a guest appearance in a special Christmas programme in Branson, Missouri.

programme.title: Just in Time for Christmas
programme.desc: Grandpa Jim is scheduled to make a guest appearance in a special Christmas programme in Branson, Missouri.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: A busy journalist embarks on a husband-seeking journey towards self-discovery with the help of two imperfect suitors.

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Having finally gotten used to each other's existence, Brad and Dusty must now deal with their intrusive fathers during the holidays.

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Having finally gotten used to each other's existence, Brad and Dusty must now deal with their intrusive fathers during the holidays.

programme.title: Bad Santa
programme.desc: A drunkard who hates kids and his sidekick pose as Santa and his elf to rob department stores at Christmas.

programme.title: Bad Santa
programme.desc: A drunkard who hates kids and his sidekick pose as Santa and his elf to rob department stores at Christmas.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Born in hell and bred to be evil, Hellboy was rescued by a benevolent doctor who raised him to be a hero. Now he must thwart a madman who wants to steal his powers and destroy mankind.

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: This high-octane action-thriller sees two men go back to the streets where it all began as they blast their way across Los Angeles and through the Mexican desert.

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: This high-octane action-thriller sees two men go back to the streets where it all began as they blast their way across Los Angeles and through the Mexican desert.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: Long before the evil Queen Ravenna was vanquished by Snow White's blade, she watched silently as her sister, Freya, suffered a heartbreaking betrayal and fled their kingdom.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: Long before the evil Queen Ravenna was vanquished by Snow White's blade, she watched silently as her sister, Freya, suffered a heartbreaking betrayal and fled their kingdom.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: When Ryan believes he's uncovered a Russian terrorist plot to collapse the United States economy, he goes from being an analyst to a spy, fighting to save his own life and those of countless others.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: When Ryan believes he's uncovered a Russian terrorist plot to collapse the United States economy, he goes from being an analyst to a spy, fighting to save his own life and those of countless others.

programme.title: Hummingbird
programme.desc: After returning from Afghanistan disillusioned, damaged and homeless, an ex-Special Forces commando is drawn into the violence and criminality of London's dangerous underworld.

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: For the love of a beautiful woman a city will burn to the ground. An epic tale of honour, war, forbidden passion and the towering Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: For the love of a beautiful woman a city will burn to the ground. An epic tale of honour, war, forbidden passion and the towering Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: When the abandoned island's dormant volcano begins roaring to life, Owen and Claire mount a campaign to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from this extinction-level event.

programme.title: Black and Missing
programme.desc: Multiple Emmy winner Geeta Gandbhir and award-winning documentarian Soledad O'Brien explore crime-related stories surrounding missing Black people.

programme.title: Rapa
programme.desc: Laureano appeals to the Court of Ferrol. Tacho is back in his cousin's criminal underworld.

programme.title: Rapa
programme.desc: As the police monitor the prime suspect, Toms gets dangerously close to Cesar's murderer.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Did the CIA kill Bob Marley? Is a doppelganger impersonating the real Avril Lavigne? What was the meaning behind Charlie Rich's insult of John Denver?

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: With the murder of another black police officer, the team suspects the killer cop has racial motivations and move quickly to save a high-profile target. David and Vivienne cross a huge line.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: The detectives must unravel the mystery of how a bride-to-be ended up dead in the river during her hens' party.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Alexandrians and the prisoners head back to the Commonwealth to confront Pamela Milton. Meanwhile, a swarm approaches the city.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol rush Judith to the hospital. Rosita, Eugene, and Gabriel search for Coco. Maggie and Negan take arms against Pamela. The heroes assemble for one last stand.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.desc: While recovering from brain surgery, Cathy struggles with the demands of her teaching job as she plans to celebrate Adam's 16th birthday.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.desc: While recovering from brain surgery, Cathy struggles with the demands of her teaching job as she plans to celebrate Adam's 16th birthday.

programme.title: The Last Anniversary
programme.desc: As the truth behind Jack is revealed and the Last Anniversary Party kicks off, more secrets are unearthed on Scribbly Gum Island.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: The detectives must unravel the mystery of how a bride-to-be ended up dead in the river during her hens' party.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol rush Judith to the hospital. Rosita, Eugene, and Gabriel search for Coco. Maggie and Negan take arms against Pamela. The heroes assemble for one last stand.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.desc: While recovering from brain surgery, Cathy struggles with the demands of her teaching job as she plans to celebrate Adam's 16th birthday.

programme.title: The Last Anniversary
programme.desc: As the truth behind Jack is revealed and the Last Anniversary Party kicks off, more secrets are unearthed on Scribbly Gum Island.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Lazslo, in bat form, is captured by Staten Island Animal Control and must be rescued. Meanwhile, Nadja can no longer resist reconnecting with her reincarnated lover, Gregor.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: The detectives must unravel the mystery of how a bride-to-be ended up dead in the river during her hens' party.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: A revelation from Alcaras turns suspicion on the entire Irvine family, exposing a secret that could tear them apart.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: The Irvines try to adapt to a new reality while Jenny uncovers clues that could shift the investigation.

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: With the murder of another black police officer, the team suspects the killer cop has racial motivations and move quickly to save a high-profile target. David and Vivienne cross a huge line.

programme.title: The Change-Up
programme.desc: In this switching places comedy, two best friends wake up in each other's bodies after a drunken night, and become very alarmed with the outcome.

programme.title: The Change-Up
programme.desc: In this switching places comedy, two best friends wake up in each other's bodies after a drunken night, and become very alarmed with the outcome.

programme.title: Something Borrowed
programme.desc: Rachel is a generous and loyal pal to her engaged best friend Darcy. But after celebrating her 30th birthday, perpetual good girl Rachel unexpectedly ends up in the arms of Darcy's fiance.

programme.title: Ladies in Black
programme.desc: Adapted from the novel by Madeleine St John, this is an alluring and tender-hearted comedy drama about the lives of a group of department store employees in 1959 Sydney.

programme.title: The Dressmaker
programme.desc: With her glamorous style and sewing machine in tow, a woman returns to her remote home town to set things right, but finds her talent by transforming the women she left behind.

programme.title: Downton Abbey: A New Era
programme.desc: The Crawley family goes on a grand journey to the South of France to uncover the mystery of the dowager countess's newly inherited villa.

programme.title: Some Kind of Wonderful
programme.desc: A misfit's crush on a teen queen takes him on a voyage of self-discovery.

programme.title: Made of Honour
programme.desc: Hannah surprises Tom, her best friend who is secretly in love with her, with the news of her engagement. Things take a complicated turn when she asks Tom to be her maid of honour.

programme.title: Made of Honour
programme.desc: Hannah surprises Tom, her best friend who is secretly in love with her, with the news of her engagement. Things take a complicated turn when she asks Tom to be her maid of honour.

programme.title: Book Club
programme.desc: Four lifelong friends have their lives forever changed after reading 50 Shades of Grey in their monthly book club.

programme.title: Book Club
programme.desc: Four lifelong friends have their lives forever changed after reading 50 Shades of Grey in their monthly book club.

programme.title: She's Having a Baby
programme.desc: A couple face the terrors of adulthood, from interfering in-laws and career crises to overextended credit and maintaining a house, but are they up to the perils of impending parenthood?

programme.title: She's Having a Baby
programme.desc: A couple face the terrors of adulthood, from interfering in-laws and career crises to overextended credit and maintaining a house, but are they up to the perils of impending parenthood?

programme.title: Wild Things
programme.desc: Two girls accuse a school counsellor of rape, but a suspicious cop isn't buying it.

programme.title: Wild Things
programme.desc: Two girls accuse a school counsellor of rape, but a suspicious cop isn't buying it.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po is now living his dream as The Dragon Warrior. But his new life is threatened by the emergence of a formidable villain, who plans to use a secret weapon to conquer China.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po is now living his dream as The Dragon Warrior. But his new life is threatened by the emergence of a formidable villain, who plans to use a secret weapon to conquer China.

programme.title: Babe
programme.desc: A piglet won by a farmer in a raffle is raised by a sheepdog as one of her own and becomes a champion sheep-herder.

programme.title: Babe
programme.desc: The inspirational story of a shy Yorkshire piglet who doesn't quite know his place in the world. But when Farmer Hoggett wins him at the county fair, Babe discovers that he can be anything he wants to be - even an award-winning sheepdog. With the help of a delightful assortment of barnyard friends, the heroic little pig is headed for the challenge of his life in this endearing and fun-filled tale the whole family will love.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: Set in the mythical world of burly Vikings and fire-breathing dragons, a Viking teenager takes in an injured dragon and sees an opportunity to set his tribe on a new course.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: Set in the mythical world of burly Vikings and fire-breathing dragons, a Viking teenager takes in an injured dragon and sees an opportunity to set his tribe on a new course.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: When Troll Village is invaded by the Bergens, two mismatched trolls must try and tolerate each other as they set out on a journey to rescue their friends.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: When Troll Village is invaded by the Bergens, two mismatched trolls must try and tolerate each other as they set out on a journey to rescue their friends.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: It has been four years since the disaster at Jurassic Park and two groups are in a race against time that will determine the fate of the remote island's prehistoric inhabitants.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: It has been four years since the disaster at Jurassic Park and two groups are in a race against time that will determine the fate of the remote island's prehistoric inhabitants.

programme.title: The Bad Guys
programme.desc: The Bad Guys are the most notorious criminals in the world, pulling off a lifetime of legendary heists, but can the gang of misfits pull off their biggest job yet: going good?

programme.title: The Bad Guys
programme.desc: The Bad Guys are the most notorious criminals in the world, pulling off a lifetime of legendary heists, but can the gang of misfits pull off their biggest job yet: going good?

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr, who's intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down, when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr, who's intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down, when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the evil wizard Gargamel chases the tiny blue Smurfs out of their village, they tumble from their magical world into New York City.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the evil wizard Gargamel chases the tiny blue Smurfs out of their village, they tumble from their magical world into New York City.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: Evil wizard Gargamel creates a couple of mischievous Smurf-like creatures called the Naughties hoping they will let him harness the magical Smurf-essence. However, he soon discovers that he needs the help of Smurfette, who knows the secret to turning the Naughties into real Smurfs. When Gargamel and his Naughties kidnap Smurfette from Smurf Village and bring her to Paris, it's up to Papa, Clumsy, Grouchy and Vanity to reunite with their human friends, Patrick and Grace Winslow, and rescue her!

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: When evil Gargamel kidnaps Smurfette, the Smurfs and their human friends led by Patrick unite to help her escape the clutches of the Naughties.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: A mysterious map sets Smurfette, and her best friends Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty, on an exciting and thrilling race through the Forbidden Forest, filled with magical creatures, to find a mysterious lost village before the evil wizard Gargamel does. Embarking on a roller-coaster journey full of action and danger, the Smurfs are on a course that leads to the discovery of the biggest secret in Smurf history.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: A mysterious map sets Smurfette, and her best friends Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty, on an exciting and thrilling race through the Forbidden Forest, filled with magical creatures, to find a mysterious lost village before the evil wizard Gargamel does. Embarking on a roller-coaster journey full of action and danger, the Smurfs are on a course that leads to the discovery of the biggest secret in Smurf history.

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: With hundreds of cases solved and adventures shared, Scooby and the gang face their most challenging mystery ever: a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world.

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: With hundreds of cases solved and adventures shared, Scooby and the gang face their most challenging mystery ever: a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Worried that his half-vampire grandson isn't showing signs of being a vampire, Dracula enlists his friends to put him through 'monster-in-training' boot camp.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Worried that his half-vampire grandson isn't showing signs of being a vampire, Dracula enlists his friends to put him through 'monster-in-training' boot camp.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: In this hilarious animated adventure comedy, you'll finally find out why the birds are so angry. In an island paradise populated entirely by happy, flightless birds - or almost entirely, Red, a bird with a temper problem, speedy Chuck, and the volatile Bomb have always been outsiders. But when the island is visited by mysterious green piggies, it's up to these unlikely outcasts to figure out what the pigs are up to.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: In this hilarious animated adventure comedy, you'll finally find out why the birds are so angry. In an island paradise populated entirely by happy, flightless birds - or almost entirely, Red, a bird with a temper problem, speedy Chuck, and the volatile Bomb have always been outsiders. But when the island is visited by mysterious green piggies, it's up to these unlikely outcasts to figure out what the pigs are up to.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: After jumping back into the dating pool, single mother Bridget Jones finds herself caught between a younger man and her son's science teacher.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a Brooklyn sex worker, marries an oligarch's son. But when the news reaches Russia, his parents rush to New York to have the marriage annulled, threatening her fairytale.

programme.title: Piece by Piece
programme.desc: LEGO bricks tell the life story of singer, songwriter and record producer Pharrell Williams - from his childhood in Virginia to his success in the music and fashion industry.

programme.title: Man With No Past
programme.desc: A man wakes up in a strange city with no memory. His search for answers leads to a clash with a powerful enemy, uncovering the truth about his identity.

programme.title: Black Bag
programme.desc: When his beloved wife, Kathryn, is suspected of betraying the nation, intelligence agent George Woodhouse faces the ultimate test - loyalty to his marriage or his country.

programme.title: High Ground
programme.desc: When a mysterious prisoner lands in his jail, a border town sheriff faces the wrath of a brutal cartel.

programme.title: Love & Rage: Munroe Bergdorf
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Munroe Bergdorf - author, model, and leading transgender activist.

programme.title: Sidelined: The QB and Me
programme.desc: A headstrong dancer and a cocky quarterback fight against their feelings for each other as their post-grad future threatens to keep them apart.

programme.title: The Dilemma
programme.desc: A man finds out that his best friend and business partner's wife may be cheating, plunging him into the moral dilemma of deciding whether to tell his friend. Comic mayhem ensues.

programme.title: Tag
programme.desc: Based on a true story. For one month every year, five highly competitive friends hit the ground running in a no-holds-barred game of tag they've been playing since the first grade.

programme.title: Night School
programme.desc: A man must attend night school classes alongside a group of oddballs in order to earn his much needed diploma.

programme.title: Ted 2
programme.desc: When he is ruled to be property and not a person, a foul-mouthed teddy bear seeks the aid of a legendary civil rights attorney to gain the justice he deserves.

programme.title: Here Today
programme.desc: Veteran comedy writer Charlie forms an unlikely yet hilarious and touching friendship with New York singer Emma, and before long, each finds in the other a sort of soulmate.

programme.title: Bad News Bears
programme.desc: Grizzled former professional baseball player Morris Buttermaker is recruited by a strait-laced lawyer to coach the Bears, a woefully inept Little League team.
